title: CorpusEntry v1
description: Machine-readable schema for curated corpus entries derived from accepted bundles or promoted knowledge artifacts.

entry/id.description: Stable identifier of the curated corpus entry.

source/type.description: Primary source class from which the corpus entry was assembled.

source/id.description: Identifier of the primary source artifact.

content/ref.description: Stable reference to the curated content body.

domain/tags.description: Domain and topic tags assigned by curation.

quality/grade.description: Curation quality assessment of the entry.

risk/grade.description: Risk classification relevant to later publication or training use.

training/eligibility.description: Training eligibility state assigned to the corpus entry.

provenance/manifest.description: Reference to provenance manifest sufficient to reconstruct source lineage.

contains-human-origin.description: Whether the curated entry preserves human-originated source material.

language.description: Primary language of the curated content.

creator/refs.description: Curator, secretary, or contributor references that should survive attribution-sensitive flows.

policy_annotations.description: Optional implementation-local annotations that do not change the core corpus-entry semantics.
